closed_world.value: Q Division police files; High Street shop and surrounding Christmas shopper crowds; wine cellars in France and England; soundproofed room; early nineteenth century Spain; shooting range
closed_world.quote: The settings range from elegant (but dangerous) wine cellars in France and England, to a soundproofed room inhabited by a dictator, to early nineteenth century Spain, to a deadly shooting range.

culprit_and_motive.value: Slippery Sam - a long sardonic clown-faced operator conducting pranks and disruptions (hecklers at meetings, lights turned out, man on roof in underclothes); motive unclear but pattern suggests serial disruption
culprit_and_motive.quote: Petrella...had memories of a long sardonic clown's face and a pair of twinkling eyes. He called him Slippery Sam

investigator.value: Inspector Petrella (and Inspector Hazlerigg) - police officers investigating cases for Q Division
investigator.quote: Petrella, who was one of the few policemen to have seen the principal operator at close quarters
